title: Implement Passkey support
excerpt: Passkeys are fast becoming the preferred mechanism for authentication. Monday.com should get ahead of this and support them. Additionally support security keys for MFA

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Passkeys are fast becoming the preferred mechanism for authentication. Monday.com should get ahead of this and support them. Additionally support security keys for MFA

posts.author: Bos (Bo)
posts.cookedHtml: +1, and also add support for hardware passkeys (fido2) would be great.
